description_long: This projector features a sleek, rectangular metallic body with a predominantly silver and black color scheme, accented by orange lines running along the top surface. The top panel includes a circular glass or plastic lens cover and a series of small, evenly spaced rivets or screws along the edge. One side displays a grid of circular ventilation holes and a set of horizontal slatted vents, while the opposite side mirrors this arrangement. The front face is equipped with two prominent, recessed projection lenses, each encased in a black housing. The rear panel is marked by a circular hatch or access port with orange detailing, suggesting a maintenance or connection point. The overall design is industrial and modern, suitable for urban environments such as public spaces, event venues, or outdoor installations.
description: A modern, rectangular projector with a metallic silver and black finish, featuring dual front lenses, orange accents, and side ventilation grids.
description_view_0: Side view showing a grid of circular ventilation holes, horizontal slatted vents, and the 'LIQUID CONTAINER' label.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting two large, recessed projection lenses in black housings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with mirrored ventilation holes and slatted vents, but without the label.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a circular hatch or access port with orange detailing and no visible lenses.
attribute_brand_logo: The text 'LIQUID CONTAINER HP-010' is visible on the upper right of the side panel, serving as a label or possible brand marking in black, sans-serif font.
attribute_lens_type: Fixed dual projection lenses, large and circular, recessed into the front face with no visible adjustment rings.
attribute_control_panel_design: A control panel is visible on the side, featuring a grid of circular buttons and a set of horizontal slatted vents, likely for input and ventilation.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Ventilation is provided by a grid of circular holes and horizontal slatted vents on both side panels, arranged in a regular, geometric pattern.
